member.name: M:EPR.Payment.Facade.Controllers.Payments.FeeCalculatorController.CalculateRegistrationFee(EPR.Payment.Facade.Common.Dtos.Request.RegistrationFee.CalculateRegistrationFeeRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: This end point will be used when a producer needs to pay for their registration and there is no late fee or resubmission fee to be applied.
member.response: Return total registration fee along with fee breakdown for Subsidiary.
If the request is invalid or a validation error occurs.
member.returns: This end point will be used when a producer needs to pay for their registration and there is no late fee or resubmission fee to be applied.
